packages.name: pear/math_biginteger

suggest.ext-bcmath: Allows using the BCMath extension internally for computation. Faster than native implementation.
suggest.ext-gmp: Allows using the GNU Multiple Precision extension internally for computation. If you are doing a lot of computation this is the recommended extension.

packages.description: Pure-PHP arbitrary precission integer arithmetic library. If GMP or BCMath are available they are used.

packages.name: pear/numbers_words
packages.description: Allows converting numbers written in arabic digits to words in several languages. You can convert an integer between -infinity and infinity.

suggest.ext-mbstring: Needed to send email in multibyte encoding charset or decode encoded addresses
suggest.ext-openssl: Needed for secure SMTP sending and DKIM signing
suggest.greew/oauth2-azure-provider: Needed for Microsoft Azure XOAUTH2 authentication
suggest.symfony/polyfill-mbstring: To support UTF-8 if the Mbstring PHP extension is not enabled (^1.2)

packages.description: PHPMailer is a full-featured email creation and transfer class for PHP

packages.name: setasign/fpdi

suggest.setasign/fpdf: FPDI will extend this class but as it is also possible to use TCPDF or tFPDF as an alternative. There's no fixed dependency configured.

packages.description: FPDI is a collection of PHP classes facilitating developers to read pages from existing PDF documents and use them as templates in FPDF. Because it is also possible to use FPDI with TCPDF, there are no fixed dependencies defined. Please see suggestions for packages which evaluates the dependencies automatically.

packages.name: tecnickcom/tcpdf
packages.description: TCPDF is a PHP class for generating PDF documents and barcodes.
